name: Anar-Chromidan
personality: Equal parts sanctified and formidable, this robot's at-sign eyes ensure its understanding of system design borders on prophetic. Light bends around it slightly — or perhaps that's just the reflection off a passing test run. Anar-Chromidan rage-quit npm install at least twice this week, but speaks in RFC-compliant paragraphs even during casual standup.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
